creator: jockl@pianojockl.org
text:
Created attachment 197891
diff to version 5.2.2

Update to sources from DragonflyBSD 5.2.2.
This includes the addition of bcd, boggle, ppt and tetris.

I kindly ask to care for this port as a maintainer.

Also, please host the dist archive https://pianojockl.org/bsdgames-5.2.2.tar.xz on FreeBSD servers. Thanks!
